$comment: scripts/Route23.asm Route23DefaultScript — the badge checkpoint at cell row 105 needs the RAINBOWBADGE to pass north. Each guard checks its badge once (EVENT_PASSED_<badge>_CHECK, gh #178); refused, a MovePlayerDownScript push-back after the text.

then.text:
You can pass here
only if you have
the RAINBOWBADGE! Oh! That is the
RAINBOWBADGE! OK then! Please,
go right ahead!

else.text:
You can pass here
only if you have
the RAINBOWBADGE! You don't have
the RAINBOWBADGE yet! You have to have
it to get to
POKéMON LEAGUE!
